op.text: Elena: Elena, Marcus's partner; gave birth to daughter Nina on 2025-03-06 (as of 2025-03-09)

Nina: Nina, niece, daughter of Marcus and Elena; born 2025-03-06. Marcus called Dana from hospital at ~2am to share the news. Dana said 'I cried at my desk' seeing first photo of Nina in a knit hat. (as of 2025-03-09)

On 2025-03-09, Dana learned Marcus and Elena had their daughter Nina on 2025-03-06. Marcus called from the hospital hallway at ~2am 'just to say "she's here."' Dana said: 'We haven't talked like that — voice shaking, no agenda — in years. Denver suddenly feels way too far away.' (2025-03-09)

Wants to visit Marcus, Elena, and baby Nina in Denver before summer 2025 'while she's still tiny'; Marcus said 'the guest room is yours.' Dana described this as 'a thing I owe now, and I want to owe it' — 'the good kind' of obligation. (opened 2025-03-09)
Upgraded to concrete plan after Nina's birth 2025-03-06; see new thread about visiting before summer 2025 (resolved 2025-03-09)
[as of 2025-03-09] Marathon training on schedule; ran ten miles on Saturday 2025-03-07 in light snow flurries
[as of 2025-03-09] Dorothy Jean restoration progressing; port side fully sanded as of 2025-03-09
